channel.title: R. Calixto — Notes & Ideas
channel.description: Recent content on R. Calixto — Notes & Ideas

item.title: About
item.description:
About

Welcome to my personal space on the internet. I’m R. Calixto and this is where I share notes, ideas, and projects.

This blog is built with Hugo using the PaperMod theme, hosted entirely for free on GitHub Pages.

Tech Philosophy

  • Simple is better.
  • Markdown wherever possible.
  • Open source always.
  • Automate what repeats.

This page is auto-generated. Feel free to edit it with your own bio.

item.title: First Post — Welcome to the Blog
item.description: Hello world — this is the first post on a Hugo-powered blog with PaperMod theme.
